codeReview.summary: The feature correctly tightens explicit-id foreign persistence: matching serialized and resolved ids still reuse or ensure the explicit row, while divergent ids now fail with a deterministic InvalidModel error before any persistence. The added regression covers the divergence seam and confirms neither candidate row is written.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mission and repo guidance require pre-edit GitNexus impact analysis, but GitNexus tooling was unavailable and the worker fell back to direct source inspection plus git diff review.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl line 3 and handoff.discoveredIssues note gitnexus_impact/gitnexus_detect_changes were unavailable; mission AGENTS.md says to use git diff fallback when tooling is unavailable.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, skill procedure, and commit b2f2e58. The implementation satisfies the milestone behavior: explicit/resolved foreign-id mismatches now fail deterministically and audibly at the seam, while the existing matching explicit-id and reuse flows remain covered by the retained regressions.
